recommendations.title: Extraction 2
recommendations.overview: Back from the brink of death, highly skilled commando Tyler Rake takes on another dangerous mission: saving the imprisoned family of a ruthless gangster.

recommendations.title: Thor: Ragnarok

recommendations.title: Atomic Blonde
recommendations.overview: An undercover MI6 agent is sent to Berlin during the Cold War to investigate the murder of a fellow agent and recover a missing list of double agents.

recommendations.title: Interceptor
recommendations.overview: A U.S. Army Captain uses her years of tactical training to save humanity from sixteen nuclear missiles launched at the U.S. as a violent attack threatens her remote missile interceptor station.

recommendations.title: Avengers: Endgame

recommendations.title: Samurai Rebellion
recommendations.overview: The mother of a feudal lord's only heir is kidnapped by the lord. Her husband and his samurai father must decide whether to accept the unjust decision, or risk death to rescue her.

recommendations.title: Shaft
recommendations.overview: Cool Black private eye John Shaft is hired by a crime lord to find and retrieve his kidnapped daughter.

recommendations.title: Branded to Kill
recommendations.overview: After botching his latest assignment, a third-ranked Japanese hit man becomes the target of another assassin.
